title: SsoAdvanced Universal SYBR Green qPCR
description: Bio-Rad SYBR Green 20 uL qPCR: fast Sso7d polymerase activation, 40 cycles, with a 65-95 C melt curve.

final.name: Melt curve: 65 to 95 C, 0.5 C increments

ingredients.name: DNA template (cDNA 100 ng-100 fg; gDNA 50 ng-5 pg)

payload.notes: SYBR Green chemistry; run the melt curve (65 to 95 C in 0.5 C increments, 2-5 sec/step) to confirm specificity. The 95 C 30 sec activation is for cDNA; for genomic DNA template use 98 C for 2-3 min to ensure complete denaturation. Primers 250-500 nM each (final). Anneal/extend can be 10-30 sec on the Bio-Rad CFX; use 60 sec on standard-mode ABI or Roche cyclers, or 30-60 sec for amplicons over 250 bp. 35-40 cycles. Source: SsoAdvanced Universal SYBR Green Supermix instruction manual (Bio-Rad 10031339), https://www.bio-rad.com/webroot/web/pdf/lsr/literature/10031339.pdf
